data.title: Security Chaos Engineering
data.description: Simulates cyber-attacks to identify vulnerabilities and improve system resilience.
data.technical_spec: Uses internal tools like Chaos Monkey to randomly terminate servers, testing system stability and retention of secure states.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Ensures secure access to sensitive systems and data by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using standards such as TOTP and OAuth 2.0 for secure user identity management.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Protects user data and content through encryption both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL protocols for data in transit, with AES-256 encryption for stored data.

data.title: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Aggregates and analyzes security data for real-time threat detection.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Splunk for centralized monitoring of security alerts and incident response.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: All requests, whether external or internal, must be verified before granting access.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of identity verification and network micro-segmentation to restrict unauthorized access.
